name: Blueface & Chrisean: Crazy In Love
overview: Take a deep dive into the trials and tribulations of one of Hip Hop’s hottest couples, ChriseanRock and Blueface. In this documentary series, we will witness the complex ups, downs and successes of their truly unorthodox and turbulent relationship.

trailers.title: Blueface & Chrisean Rock: Crazy In Love | Season 2 | Official Trailer | Zeus
